title: MCP Server Approval
description: Vendor approval for an MCP server in the AI Registry

serverId.description: MCP server identifier (must exist in the Anthropic MCP registry)

version.description: Pinned server version (e.g., 1.0.1). Omit to use the latest version from the MCP registry.

tool.description: Tool ID this config targets (must match a tool in the AI Registry)

installUrl.description: Deep-link URL for one-click install (tool-specific protocol)

openVsxUrl.description: Link to an VS Code extension on OpenVSX that installs the MCP server configuration

config.description: Tool-specific configuration object (e.g., MCP server settings)
